name: @intercity-bus/graphql-gateway
description: GraphQL API gateway for the Intercity Bus Booking AI local demo

scripts.build: echo "No build needed for JavaScript project"
scripts.typecheck: echo "No typecheck needed for JavaScript project"
scripts.test:perf: node -e "const fs=require('node:fs'); fs.rmSync('tests/performance/results.jtl',{force:true}); fs.rmSync('tests/performance/report',{recursive:true,force:true});" && jmeter -n -t tests/performance/graphql-gateway.jmx -l tests/performance/results.jtl -e -o tests/performance/report
